total_women_identified.description: Total number of women born in 1930 identified from the general practice's age-sex register.

not_contactable.description: Number of women out of 132 who were not contactable, referenced in the answer to question the accuracy of the register.

excluded_women.description: Number of women excluded from the study for various reasons, leaving the final sample.

final_sample_size.description: Final number of women actually studied after exclusions, whose representativeness is being assessed.
